title: Property Consultant - Amrapali Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Amrapali Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
